ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this metric belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season this metric belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this metric belongs to */,
  "entries" INTEGER /* Number of game entries for the player */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach leads */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season this game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (coach or analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account this access control belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team this access control is for */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season this access control is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)
